levels.L1: Full supervision — user approves plan, reviews each phase
levels.L2: Notification — user notified at plan phase, not blocking
levels.L3: Autonomous standard — user notified at end only
levels.L4: Full autonomous — no notifications except blockers

_schema.promotion: Sentinelle proposes after 3+ consecutive PASS runs → user confirms
_schema.demotion: Any BLOCK failure → immediate reset to L1
